world_history: The Shattering occurred 300 years ago, when the Void Crown was broken into five shards.
The old kingdom of Valdris collapsed overnight. Its cities became ruins haunted by Void-touched creatures.
Survivors scattered across the floating island remnants of what was once a continent.

human.name: Human
human.description: Adaptable survivors. Humans have no innate power, but learn faster than any other race.
human.passive: Fast Learner â€” gain +10% bonus XP from all sources.

void_scarred.name: Void-Scarred
void_scarred.unlock_condition: Survive direct exposure to raw Void energy three times.
void_scarred.description: A human changed by prolonged Void exposure. Their eyes glow faintly purple.
void_scarred.passive: Void Attunement â€” can read Void runes without a primer.

saltmarsh_veteran.name: Saltmarsh Veteran
saltmarsh_veteran.description: Hardened by years of surviving on the edge of the broken world.
saltmarsh_veteran.passive: Grit â€” survive one killing blow per rest with 1 HP.

ashen_elf.name: Ashen Elf
ashen_elf.description: Ancient beings who survived the Shattering by merging partially with the ash itself. Graceful but cold.
ashen_elf.passive: Ash Step â€” movement makes no sound. Enemies have -10% chance to detect you.

ember_elf.name: Ember Elf
ember_elf.unlock_condition: Channel ARC magic at least 20 times in combat.
ember_elf.description: An Ashen Elf who has rekindled the old flame magic thought lost in the Shattering.
ember_elf.passive: Ember Aura â€” fire damage dealt ignites enemies for 2 turns.

void_shade.name: Void Shade
void_shade.description: An Ashen Elf who has embraced the darkness of the Void Below.
void_shade.passive: Shadow Meld â€” become invisible for 1 turn per combat once per rest.

ironborn_dwarf.name: Ironborn Dwarf
ironborn_dwarf.description: Stocky survivors who rebuilt their forges on the floating islands. Tough as the stone they carve.
ironborn_dwarf.passive: Iron Skin â€” reduce all incoming physical damage by 1.

runeforged.name: Runeforged
runeforged.unlock_condition: Craft or upgrade 3 weapons or armor pieces.
runeforged.description: A dwarf who has etched living runes into their own skin.
runeforged.passive: Runic Resilience â€” weapons and armor you use never degrade.

ash_delver.name: Ash Delver
ash_delver.description: A dwarf who tunnels through the ashen ruins, unearthing secrets others cannot reach.
ash_delver.passive: Tremorsense â€” detect hidden doors and traps within 10 feet.

void_goblin.name: Void Goblin
void_goblin.description: Small, cunning scavengers mutated by Void energy after the Shattering. Underestimated by everyone. Dangerous because of it.
void_goblin.passive: Scavenger â€” always find one extra item when looting corpses or ruins.

hex_touched.name: Hex-Touched
hex_touched.unlock_condition: Inflict 3 different status effects on enemies (poison, bleed, stun, etc.).
hex_touched.description: A Void Goblin who has learned to weaponise the chaotic energy in their blood.
hex_touched.passive: Hex Blood â€” status effects you inflict last 1 extra turn.

chrome_runt.name: Chrome Runt
chrome_runt.unlock_condition: Steal from 5 different NPCs without getting caught.
chrome_runt.description: A Void Goblin who has grafted salvaged metal scraps onto their body as crude armour.
chrome_runt.passive: Junk Armour â€” reduce incoming damage by 2, but make noise on stealth checks.

ashen_knight.name: Ashen Knight
ashen_knight.description: A heavily armored survivor of the old royal guard. Relies on brute force and endurance.

void_paladin.name: Void Paladin
void_paladin.unlock_condition: Defeat a Void-touched boss while below 25% HP.
void_paladin.description: A knight who channels Void energy into holy wrath.

bone_warden.name: Bone Warden
bone_warden.unlock_condition: Block or absorb over 500 total damage across your playthrough.
bone_warden.description: A knight so battle-hardened their body has begun to calcify.

void_drifter.name: Void Drifter
void_drifter.description: A rogue who survived the cataclysm by hiding in shadows. Fast and lethal.

phantom_blade.name: Phantom Blade
phantom_blade.description: A drifter who phases partially into the Void during attacks.

void_hunter.name: Void Hunter
void_hunter.unlock_condition: Track and kill 3 enemies that fled from combat.
void_hunter.description: A relentless tracker who hunts Void-touched creatures for sport.

rune_scribe.name: Rune-Scribe
rune_scribe.description: A scholar who wields the dangerous, shattered magic that destroyed the world. Glass cannon.

shard_caller.name: Shard Caller
shard_caller.description: A Rune-Scribe attuned to the resonance of the shattered Crown.

runic_warder.name: Runic Warder
runic_warder.unlock_condition: Successfully defend an ally or location using magic 5 times.
runic_warder.description: A scribe who specialises in protective and binding runes.

void_ranger.name: Void Ranger
void_ranger.description: A spectral archer channeling Void energy through their bow. Deadly at range.

wraith_archer.name: Wraith Archer
wraith_archer.unlock_condition: Kill 5 enemies from stealth with ranged attacks.
wraith_archer.description: A ranger whose arrows phase through walls and light armour.

storm_caller.name: Storm Caller
storm_caller.unlock_condition: Hit 3 or more enemies with a single attack 5 times.
storm_caller.description: A ranger who fires barrages of Void-charged arrows.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Slam your shield into an enemy, dealing damage and stunning them briefly.

iron_stance.name: Iron Stance
iron_stance.description: Plant your feet and brace for impact, reducing incoming damage this turn.
iron_stance.effect: reduce incoming damage by 50% this turn

poison_blade.name: Poison Blade
poison_blade.description: Coat your weapon in void-touched poison, causing damage over time.

shadow_step.name: Shadow Step
shadow_step.description: Melt into the shadows and reappear behind your target for a backstab.

void_bolt.name: Void Bolt
void_bolt.description: Fire a concentrated bolt of Void energy at a single target.

rune_ward.name: Rune Ward
rune_ward.description: Inscribe a protective rune on yourself or an ally, absorbing incoming damage.
rune_ward.effect: absorb up to 10 damage next hit

arcane_sight.name: Arcane Sight
arcane_sight.description: Open your mind to the Void, revealing hidden objects, traps, and magical auras.
arcane_sight.effect: reveal hidden items and traps in current location

void_shot.name: Void Shot
void_shot.description: Fire an arrow charged with Void energy that pierces through light armor.

hunters_eye.name: Hunter's Eye
hunters_eye.description: Study your target, identifying their weakness and increasing your next attack.
